meta.summary: Today’s meaningful AI discussion was narrow: one thread around compact multimodal models for practical document understanding, and another around local desktop agent tooling with direct filesystem access. Both matter because they point to where AI is getting deployed next: efficient specialized models and more capable end-user agents, with security tradeoffs becoming central.
